title: Smoky Cauliflower Gratin Italiano
description: A creamy, cheesy Italian-inspired dish featuring smoky, crispy cauliflower gratin.
instructions: 2. Rinse the cauliflower and break into florets. In a large bowl, toss the cauliflower with olive oil, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper until the cauliflower is evenly coated.
3. Spread the cauliflower on a baking sheet and roast for 20 minutes, or until tender and lightly browned.
4. In a saucepan, combine the heavy cream and garlic. Bring to a simmer over medium heat and cook until the cream has thickened slightly, about 5 minutes.
5. Stir in the parmesan cheese until melted and smooth. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. In a greased 9x13-inch baking dish, arrange the roasted cauliflower in an even layer. Pour the cream sauce over the cauliflower.
7. Sprinkle the top with dried basil. Bake for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned and the sauce is bubbly.
8. Serve hot, garnished with additional basil if desired.
